store_profile.name: Chateau Kampot
store_profile.description: Luxury boutique hotel in Kampot with family-friendly rooms, balconies, free Wi-Fi, a rooftop pool, spa and wellness services, fitness room, restaurant, bar, and 24-hour front desk service.

property_highlights.perfect_for: Boutique stay in Kampot with city, garden, pool, mountain, and river-view room options.
property_highlights.breakfast_info: Continental, vegetarian, Asian, American, and English breakfast options.

description_sections.title: Property
description_sections.body: Chateau Kampot is a luxury boutique hotel in Kampot with individually furnished rooms, balconies, separate sitting areas, and work-friendly spaces.

description_sections.title: Facilities
description_sections.body: Guests can use a rooftop pool, spa services, a fitness room, restaurant and bar, free Wi-Fi, free parking, concierge support, and 24-hour front desk service.

description_sections.title: Dining
description_sections.body: La Farine Patisserie is listed as the on-site restaurant. Breakfast options include continental, vegetarian, Asian, American, and English breakfast service.

pet_policy.notes: Pets and service animals are listed as not allowed by Expedia.

child_policy.notes: Children are welcome. Children aged 4 and younger are listed as eating breakfast free. Rollaway/extra beds are listed at about USD 25 per night.

pricing_note: Booking.com rate snapshot for 2026-05-22 to 2026-05-23, 2 adults, 1 room: Deluxe Double Room with Balcony $55; Deluxe Twin Room $82 (was $95); Junior Suite with Balcony $90 (was $105); Executive Suite $98 (was $114); Family Suite with Balcony $106 (was $123). Rates remain dynamic by date, occupancy, currency, availability, and member eligibility.
